title: Thai Smoked Mozzarella Gratin
description: A creamy and smoky Thai-inspired gratin dish featuring melted mozzarella cheese. Perfect for a comforting dinner or a unique dessert.
instructions: In a medium bowl, whisk together eggs, cream, and a pinch of salt and sugar.
In a separate bowl, mix together diced mozzarella, smoky, and Thai chili flakes.
Grease a 9x13 inch baking dish with olive oil.
Add the mozzarella mixture to the prepared baking dish.
Pour the egg mixture over the mozzarella mixture.
Bake for 35-40 minutes or until the top is golden brown and the gratin is set.
Remove from oven and let cool for a few minutes before serving.
